text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Twice in one day, ouch.

This PR can be safely ignored. This was already updated by demon several
hours after my 0700 EST cvsup on the 17th. Again, I need to do a last
minute cvsup before submitting a PR. Who would have though this would
happen twice in one day with analog/mrtg. Well, I apologize for any time
wasted by those who have to go through these PRs.

Regards,
Matt Heckaman
